text: Fish farming (aquaculture) is a growing sector in Uganda, especially tilapia and catfish. Start with a small earthen pond (10m×10m, depth 1.5m) or tank system. Pond construction: UGX 500,000-1,000,000 (manual digging). Fingerlings: UGX 200-500 each (start with 500-1,000). Feed: commercial pellets UGX 3,500-5,000/kg, or supplementary feeds (rice bran, kitchen waste). Total startup for 1 pond with 500 tilapia: UGX 1,000,000-2,000,000. Harvest cycle: 6-8 months for table-size tilapia (300-500g). Selling price: UGX 8,000-15,000/kg depending on size and location. Revenue per cycle: UGX 1,200,000-3,000,000. Key regions: Jinja, Mukono, Mpigi, Wakiso (water availability critical).
